span.p: Is dbt Core or dbt Cloud already the transform tool?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Do BI tools need native MetricFlow integration - dbt Semantic Layer SDK?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: dbt Semantic Layer with MetricFlow - metrics live with the models

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Need pre-aggregations / multi-source cross-joins / custom REST API?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cube OSS - richer query API + pre-agg cache + securityContext

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is Cube being added on top of an existing dbt project?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cube reads from dbt marts - do NOT re-define measures in both tools

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cube owns the full semantic model
